foods.name: Fresh Watermelon Juice

foods.name: Rose Sharbat

foods.description: Freshly pressed sugarcane with ginger, lemon and black salt. A traditional street corner classic.

foods.description: Fresh young coconut water served chilled. Pure, natural electrolytes and utterly tropical.

foods.name: Mutton Keema Paratha

foods.name: Veg Manchow Soup
